heading: Department of State notification of families of victims
label: 5503 Department of State notification of families of victims

children.heading: Department of State policy
children.label: a Department of State policy
children.text: It is the policy of the Department of State pursuant to to directly and promptly notify the families of victims of aviation disasters abroad concerning citizens of the United States directly affected by such a disaster, including timely written notice. The Secretary of State shall ensure that such notification by the Department of State is carried out notwithstanding notification by any other person.section 2715 of this title

children.heading: Department of State guidelines
children.label: b Department of State guidelines
children.text: Not later than 60 days after , the Secretary of State shall issue such regulations, guidelines, and circulars as are necessary to ensure that the policy under subsection (a) is fully implemented.November 16, 1990
